ems.blurb: Icomply installs, commissions and services EMS fire detection systems across Stockport, Manchester and the wider North West, with engineers who work to BS 5839 for new builds, refurbishments and retrofit upgrades. From panel programming and device addressing to planned maintenance, false-alarm reduction and full certification paperwork, we keep EMS kit compliant for landlords, FM teams and commercial sites. Trade panel batteries, detectors, call points and engineer consumables are available from our North West trade shop for contractors who need same-week turnaround.

fagerhult.blurb: Icomply designs, installs and tests Fagerhult emergency lighting for offices, schools, warehouses and multi-storey residential schemes across Greater Manchester and the North West. Our electricians commission maintained and non-maintained luminaires to BS 5266, complete duration testing and issue certification so exit routes stay lit when power fails. Trade LED emergency fittings, replacement batteries and exit legend kits are stocked for facilities teams and electrical contractors working across Stockport, Cheshire and Lancashire.

fermax.blurb: Icomply supplies and installs Fermax audio and video door entry systems for apartments, HMOs and commercial entrances across Stockport, Manchester and the North West. We replace ageing handsets, commission multi-way panels, integrate electric releases and provide planned maintenance so residents and site teams keep reliable access control. Trade handsets, outdoor panels, flush boxes and rain hoods are available through our trade shop for landlords, electrical contractors and FM providers who need local stock without long lead times.

ferroli.blurb: Icomply is a Gas Safe partner for Ferroli boiler installation, servicing and repairs across Greater Manchester, Cheshire and Lancashire. From first-fix commissioning and flue certification to annual landlord services and reactive fault-finding, our engineers carry common Ferroli spares so downtime stays short for homes and small commercial plant. Trade service kits, electrodes, gaskets and flue accessories are sold through our North West shop for heating contractors who need dependable stock mid-job.

fike.blurb: Icomply designs, installs and maintains Fike fire detection and alarm systems for industrial, commercial and multi-occupancy buildings across the North West. Our fire engineers programme addressable loops to BS 5839, integrate cause-and-effect, complete commissioning certificates and deliver planned service visits that keep Fike panels audit-ready. Trade detectors, bases, call points and panel service consumables are available from our Stockport-area trade counter for contractors and FM teams mid-project.

flaktgroup.blurb: Icomply installs, commissions and maintains FlaktGroup AOV and air-handling equipment for smoke control and ventilation on multi-storey and commercial buildings across Greater Manchester and the North West.
